work_unit: AS-GOV-003: add _derived_fix_status_enum and _status_enum_note annotations to audit-cycle-state.json header
situation: audit-2026-07-02-005 finding AS-GOV-003 (priority 3, route-fix): audit-cycle-state.json lacked explicit enum documentation for derived_fixes[].status field. Downstream consumers (engine, audit scripts, human reviewers) had to hardcode or infer the valid values [pending, merged, rejected]. Adding schema-level annotation at file header makes the contract self-describing without changing runtime behavior.
